summary: Iteration 52 - Complete Calendar System testing. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified Events Calendar (Month/List views), Notification bell with dropdown, CMS Global Events Manager with registrations view, and Mentorship Calendar with slot management.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@consultant.com / Admin123! (member login uses 'username' field)
seed_data_creation: Test events created during backend tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar system fully tested. Backend calendar.py handles: admin events CRUD, member registration/cancellation with waitlist promotion, notifications, mentor slots CRUD, member booking. Frontend pages: GlobalCalendar.js (Month/List views), MyAccountLayout.js (notification bell), GlobalEventsManager.js (CMS), MentorshipCalendar.js (mentor slots), MentorCalendarView.js (member booking), MyBookings.js (reservations). Note: My Calendar nav item only visible for users with is_mentor=true. Mentor Calendar nav item only visible for users with mentor_id assigned.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/calendar/events: PASS - Lists all events with registered_count and waitlist_count
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/calendar/events: PASS - Creates event with all fields
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/calendar/events/{id}/regi: PASS - Returns registrations with member data
backend_apis.GET /api/member/calendar/events: PASS - Returns events with my_status field

frontend_events_calendar.month_view: PASS - Calendar grid with day cells
frontend_events_calendar.event_card: PASS - Shows title, date, time, location, spots, status
frontend_events_calendar.registration_status: PASS - Shows 'Registered' badge with Cancel button

frontend_notifications.mark_all_read: PASS - Button visible when unread notifications exist

frontend_cms_events.events_table: PASS - Shows events with all columns
frontend_cms_events.event_dialog: PASS - data-testid='event-dialog' with all form fields

frontend_mentorship_calendar.calendar_grid: PASS - Month view with color-coded legend
frontend_mentorship_calendar.slot_dialog: PASS - All form fields (date, start, end, type, max, status, description)

frontend_my_bookings.table_structure: PASS - Columns: Date, Time, Mentor, Type, Status, Actions
frontend_my_bookings.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No reservations yet' when empty

navigation.my_calendar_nav: INFO - Only visible for users with is_mentor=true
navigation.mentor_calendar_nav: INFO - Only visible for users with mentor_id assigned
